services.name: App Service Plan
services.purpose: Hosting plan for the Node.js web app

services.name: App Service
services.purpose: Hosts the Express.js web application via Oryx auto-build

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: Stores SESSION_SECRET; referenced as a Key Vault secret in App Service app settings

services.name: Log Analytics Workspace
services.purpose: Centralized log sink for App Service and Application Insights

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: APM and request monitoring for the Express app

costEstimate.disclaimer: Estimate based on Azure Retail Prices API (eastus2). Verify at azure.com/pricing.

rejectedAlternatives.reason: No Dockerfile — Oryx App Service is simpler and cheaper (free tier available)
Deploying as-is with SQLite per deploy-as-is rule; migration is a post-deploy recommendation
Deploying as-is with MemoryStore per deploy-as-is rule; Redis is a post-deploy recommendation

assumptions: App Service F1 is shared compute suitable for dev/test; upgrade to B1 (~$13/mo) for production
SQLite database is stored on App Service local filesystem — data is ephemeral on platform restarts
express-session MemoryStore — sessions are lost on app restart
Log Analytics + App Insights data ingestion assumed < 5 GB/month (within free tier)

deployStrategy.reason: No native modules, no Dockerfile — Oryx auto-build handles npm install and startup automatically.

instrumentation.reason: Express app — Application Insights provides request traces, dependency tracking, and live metrics at no cost within free tier.

postDeployRecommendations.title: Replace SQLite with a managed database
postDeployRecommendations.reason: SQLite stores data on the ephemeral local filesystem. Data is lost on platform restarts and cannot be shared across scaled-out instances.
services: Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server

postDeployRecommendations.title: Replace MemoryStore with Redis session store
postDeployRecommendations.reason: In-process session storage causes all users to be logged out on app restart or when running multiple instances.

postDeployRecommendations.title: Upgrade to App Service B1 for production
postDeployRecommendations.reason: F1 (Free) has shared compute with 60 CPU min/day limit and no custom domain support. B1 (~$13/mo) provides dedicated compute and custom domain.
